ksa_text: Knowledge of data quality management program design, including profiling methodologies, rule authoring standards, quality threshold setting, issue classification and prioritization, escalation path design, and continuous improvement cycles.

dcwf.top_element_label: Knowledge of functionality, quality, and security requirements and how these will apply to specific items of supply (i.e., elements and processes).

nist_ai_rmf.top_element_label: Policies, processes, procedures, and practices across the organization related to the mapping, measuring, and managing of AI risks are in place, transparent, and implemented effectively.

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: KSA DQ-K-004 (Data Quality/Knowledge) scores 0.451 composite (highest: EU AI Act at 0.451). Scope is edge_case for Trust Engineer: 0 in-scope signals, 0 out-of-scope signals. Seniority is appropriate.

pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: Include upheld. Data Quality is market-validated for Trust Engineer. Final decision: include.
